heading: General authority of Secretary for conducting studies, research, and investigations unaffected
label: 1205 General authority of Secretary for conducting studies, research, and investigations unaffected
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to alter, amend, repeal, modify, or diminish the present general authority of the Secretary of Commerce to conduct studies, research, and investigations related to the mission of the Department of Commerce.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions to Secretary of Commerce from Secretary of the Interior and substitution of Department of Commerce for Department of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. 4 of 1970, see note set out under .section 1201 of this title
